title: Jubilee Cycle — 49/50 Year Harmonic Series
description: The biblical Jubilee: after 7×7=49 years, the 50th year is proclaimed as Jubilee — a year of release, return, and restoration. The tension between 49 (7²) and 50 (2×25) creates a harmonic ratio of 50:49 — the smallest superparticular ratio, producing the 'syntonic comma' in music theory.

jubilee_structure.note: 7×7=49, then +1=50. The extra year is the 'overtone' beyond the square.

harmonic_analysis.significance: The smallest distance between harmonically significant numbers. The Jubilee 'almost' closes the cycle at 49 but adds one more — a slight detuning that prevents stagnation.

gematria_connections.50: 50 = נ (Nun) — the 14th letter, gates of understanding
gematria_connections.note: The 50th gate (Sha'ar HaNun) is the highest gate of Binah (Understanding)
